name: Reames Cheesy Broccoli Tuna Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 package REAMES Home Style Frozen - Egg Noodles (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook noodles in boiling water for 20 minutes.
3. Blend soup and milk into a smooth sauce. Add onions and mushrooms.
4. Drain the noodles.
5. Layer 1 1/2 cups noodles, 1/3 cup tuna, and 1 cup broccoli in a 2-quart casserole.
6. Pour in 1 cup of sauce.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Bake for 20 minutes.
9. Add cheese and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Makes 6 servings.
